title.zh: 智能危急预警系统 - 肋骨骨折检测

fda.productCodeName: Radiology Computer Aided Triage And Notification Software
fda.applicant: Shanghai United Imaging Intelligence Co., Ltd.

title.zh: 智能危急预警系统 - 颅内出血检测

tagline.zh: 急诊颅内出血 AI 辅助筛查与分诊
tagline.en: AI-assisted ICH screening and triage for emergency

description.zh: 当急诊科医生需要评估患者头颅 CT 是否存在颅内出血时，自动完成 ICH 筛查与量化分析，输出结构化分诊结论，辅助医生快速识别危急病情。
description.en: When an ER physician needs to evaluate a patient's head CT for intracranial hemorrhage, this Skill automatically performs ICH screening and quantitative analysis, outputs a structured triage summary, and assists the physician in rapidly identifying critical conditions.

overview.zh: 急诊颅内出血 AI 辅助筛查与分诊
overview.en: AI-assisted ICH screening and triage for emergency

intro.zh: 当急诊科医生需要评估患者头颅 CT 是否存在颅内出血时，自动完成 ICH 筛查与量化分析，输出结构化分诊结论，辅助医生快速识别危急病情。
intro.en: When an ER physician needs to evaluate a patient's head CT for intracranial hemorrhage, this Skill automatically performs ICH screening and quantitative analysis, outputs a structured triage summary, and assists the physician in rapidly identifying critical conditions.

sub.zh:
ICH 阳性检出
FDA 验证集
sub.en:
ICH positive detection
FDA validation set

sub.zh:
ICH 阴性排除
FDA 验证集
sub.en:
ICH negative exclusion
FDA validation set

capabilities.zh: 检测颅内出血阳性/阴性，输出总体积及 5 种亚型分量（IPH / IVH / SAH / SDH / EDH）
capabilities.en: Detect ICH positive/negative, output total volume and 5 subtype volumes (IPH / IVH / SAH / SDH / EDH)

capabilities.zh: 检出水肿并量化中线位移距离及方向
capabilities.en: Detect edema and quantify midline shift distance and direction

capabilities.zh: 按固化规则自动判定危急值（ICH 阳性 / 中线位移 > 5mm）
capabilities.en: Automatically determine critical values by fixed rules (ICH positive / midline shift > 5mm)

desc.zh: 急诊医生向 Agent 描述评估需求，或 PACS 收到新扫描完成事件后自动触发
desc.en: ER physician describes assessment needs to Agent, or PACS triggers automatically upon new scan completion

desc.zh: 确认：模态 = CT · 序列 = 非增强 · 部位 = 头颅；不符则终止并提示
desc.en: Verify: modality = CT · series = non-contrast · region = head; abort with notice if mismatch

desc.zh: 调用 PACS 基础工具，按患者 ID / 检查号获取目标序列
desc.en: Call PACS base tools to retrieve target series by patient ID / accession number

desc.zh: 影像出院内网前必须完成，调用 PACS 去标识化工具处理 DICOM
desc.en: Must be completed before images leave the intranet; call PACS de-identification tool to process DICOM

desc.zh: 传入去标识后 DICOM URI，返回 job_id
desc.en: Pass de-identified DICOM URI, returns job_id

desc.zh: 循环查询直至 status = completed；失败则终止返回错误
desc.en: Poll until status = completed; abort and return error on failure

desc.zh: 返回：出血阳性/阴性 · 总体积 · 5 种亚型体积 · 水肿 · 中线位移 · 危急值标记
desc.en: Returns: hemorrhage pos/neg · total volume · 5 subtype volumes · edema · midline shift · critical flag

desc.zh: 规则固化，不由 LLM 推断：ICH 阳性 → 危急（T/CHAS 10-4-9-2019）；中线位移 > 5mm → 危急（产品参考值）
desc.en: Rules are hardcoded, not inferred by LLM: ICH positive → critical (T/CHAS 10-4-9-2019); midline shift > 5mm → critical (product reference)

desc.zh: 返回给 Agent / 医生，含免责声明
desc.en: Return to Agent / physician, with disclaimer

desc.zh: 联影智能 ICH 推理服务，提供 submit_inference / poll_status / get_result 三个工具接口
desc.en: UII ICH inference service, providing submit_inference / poll_status / get_result tool interfaces

desc.zh: 需支持 DICOM 调阅 · DICOM 去标识化两项操作；去标识化为合规强制步骤，不可跳过
desc.en: Must support DICOM retrieval and DICOM de-identification; de-identification is a mandatory compliance step

desc.zh: 影像出院内网前须完成去标识化，Skill 内已将此步骤设为强制执行，Agent 不可绕过
desc.en: Images must be de-identified before leaving the intranet; this step is enforced within the Skill and cannot be bypassed by the Agent

note.zh: 急诊医生向 Agent 描述评估需求，或 PACS 收到新扫描完成事件后自动触发。
note.en: The ER physician describes the assessment request to the Agent, or PACS triggers automatically when a new scan-complete event is received.

hint.zh: 复制下面这段话，粘贴给任一能读懂自然语言、可执行本地脚本的 AI 助手
hint.en: Copy the text below and paste it to any AI assistant that can read natural language and execute local scripts

code.zh:
安装 ich_emergency_triage：

源码：https://github.com/uii-ai/agents-hub/tree/main/skills/ich-emergency-triage

依赖：
  • UII MCP Server（联影智能 ICH 推理接口）
  • PACS 基础工具（DICOM 调阅 + 去标识化）
code.en:
Install ich_emergency_triage:

Source: https://github.com/uii-ai/agents-hub/tree/main/skills/ich-emergency-triage

Dependencies:
  • UII MCP Server (UII ICH inference API)
  • PACS Base Tools (DICOM retrieval + de-identification)

title.zh: CT 胸部骨折智能分析系统
title.en: AI-Assisted Analysis System for Bony Thorax Fractures

title.zh: CT 主动脉智能分析系统
title.en: AI-Assisted Analysis System for Aortic Dissection

title.zh: CT头颈血管智能分析系统
title.en: AI-Assisted Analysis System for Cerebral and Carotid Vessels

title.zh: CT 冠脉智能分析系统
title.en: AI-Assisted Analysis System for Coronary CTA Imaging

title.zh: CT 下肢血管智能评估系统
title.en: AI-Assisted Analysis System for Lower Extremity CTA Imaging

title.zh: CT 颅内出血智能分析系统
title.en: AI-Assisted Analysis System for Intracerebral Hemorrhage

description.zh: 通过普通摄像头捕捉面部视频，完成心率与呼吸率的无接触检测，输出带置信度评分的测量数值。
description.en: Capture facial video through a standard camera to perform non-contact heart-rate and respiratory-rate detection, returning measurements with confidence scores.

intro.zh: 用户以自然语言发起生命体征测量请求，Agent 识别意图后调用本 Skill，通过普通摄像头捕捉面部视频，完成心率与呼吸率的无接触检测，输出带置信度评分的测量数值。
intro.en: The user requests a vital-sign measurement in natural language. After the Agent recognizes the intent, it invokes this Skill to capture facial video through a standard camera, perform non-contact heart-rate and respiratory-rate detection, and return measurements with confidence scores.

capabilities.zh: 通过摄像头无接触检测心率（HR）与呼吸率（RR）
capabilities.en: Detect heart rate (HR) and respiratory rate (RR) without contact through a camera

capabilities.zh: 每项测量结果附带置信度评分
capabilities.en: Attach a confidence score to each measurement result

desc.zh: 用户向 Agent 表达测量心率、呼吸率或进行快速健康自测的意图。
desc.en: The user tells the Agent they want to measure heart rate, respiratory rate, or run a quick wellness check.

desc.zh: 检查摄像头可用、光线充足，并提示用户保持正面朝向与相对静止。
desc.en: Check that the camera is available, lighting is sufficient, and the user is facing forward while staying relatively still.

desc.zh: 通过摄像头采集一段面部视频，作为无接触体征检测输入。
desc.en: Capture a short facial video through the camera as input for non-contact vital-sign detection.

title.zh: 调用 VitalLens API 进行 rPPG 分析
title.en: Call VitalLens API for rPPG analysis

desc.zh: 将面部视频提交给 VitalLens API，通过 rPPG 分析提取心率与呼吸率信号。
desc.en: Submit the facial video to the VitalLens API and use rPPG analysis to extract heart-rate and respiratory-rate signals.

desc.zh: 接收心率、呼吸率测量结果及对应置信度评分。
desc.en: Receive heart-rate and respiratory-rate measurements with their confidence scores.

title.zh: 输出一次呼吸心率测量结果
title.en: Output one respiratory and heart-rate measurement

desc.zh: 以自然语言输出本次呼吸率与心率测量结果，并附带置信度评分。
desc.en: Output the respiratory-rate and heart-rate measurements in natural language with confidence scores.

desc.zh: 需要配置 VITALLENS_API_KEY 环境变量。
desc.en: Requires the VITALLENS_API_KEY environment variable.

desc.zh: 需要允许访问摄像头以采集面部视频。
desc.en: Requires camera access permission to capture facial video.

desc.zh: 稳定光源、正面朝向，并避免大幅移动。
desc.en: Stable lighting, front-facing posture, and avoiding large movements.

note.zh: 当用户希望通过摄像头了解自己当前的心率或呼吸率时触发，包括主动询问实时体征、运动后想确认心率恢复状态，或想做一次快速健康自测等场景。
note.en: Triggers when the user wants to understand their current heart rate or respiratory rate through a camera, including asking about real-time vitals, checking heart-rate recovery after exercise, or doing a quick wellness self-check.

hint.zh: 复制下面这段话，粘贴给任一能执行本地脚本的 AI 助手（如 Claude Code）
hint.en: Copy the text below and paste it to any AI assistant that can run local scripts (e.g. Claude Code)

code.zh:
安装 vitallens_noncontact_vitals：

源码：https://github.com/ruanrrn/uii-agents-hub/tree/main/vitallens

依赖：
  • VitalLens API Key（环境变量 VITALLENS_API_KEY）
  • 摄像头访问权限
code.en:
Install vitallens_noncontact_vitals:

Source: https://github.com/ruanrrn/uii-agents-hub/tree/main/vitallens

Dependencies:
  • VitalLens API Key (VITALLENS_API_KEY environment variable)
  • Camera access permission
